sources.title: Use the Gemini Code Assist agent mode
supports: Gemini Code Assist agent mode is preview
IDE agent uses files terminal and optional tools
tool actions require explicit control

sources.title: Gemini Code Assist Terms of Service and Privacy Policies
supports: terms and privacy policy depend on product edition
account edition must be identified before use

sources.title: Jules Getting started
supports: Google sign-in and privacy notice are required
GitHub connection and repository selection are required
plans precede code changes

sources.title: Jules Limits and Plans
supports: Jules has documented free and paid task tiers
paid launch serves individual Google accounts
Jules requires age 18 or older

sources.title: Jules Managing tasks and repos
supports: Jules accesses only explicitly allowed repositories
repository grants are managed through the GitHub application

sources.title: Jules FAQ
supports: Jules documents private repository training posture
repository access remains adjustable and explicit

sources.title: Gemini 3 for developers and Google Antigravity
supports: Antigravity is an agentic development platform
agents can operate across editor terminal and browser
the launch article documented availability on Windows macOS and Linux

sources.title: Getting Started with Antigravity IDE
supports: Antigravity IDE requires local installation Chrome and a personal Gmail account
terminal review and JavaScript execution policies are configurable
agent access includes local files and commands

sources.title: Google Antigravity Plans
supports: individual and team terms differ
quota and model availability depend on plan

sources.title: Google Antigravity Browser
supports: browser tooling can read and actuate local Chrome
browser uses allowlist and denylist controls
agent browser profile is isolated from the primary Chrome profile

blockers: terms acceptance and subscription state unverified
evaluations.smallest_external_action: Human-controlled readback of the intended Google account, product terms, age and region eligibility, and plan without granting access or activating a provider.

evaluations.provider_surface: Gemini Code Assist agent mode candidate
blockers: Gemini Scout is an Atlas role rather than a verified provider product
provider edition and account boundary unselected
evaluations.smallest_external_action: Select one named Gemini surface and account edition, then approve a separate read-only research warrant with private data excluded.

blockers: privacy notice not accepted for this mission
GitHub application and repository access not granted
evaluations.smallest_external_action: After account eligibility approval, grant Jules least access to a disposable non-production repository and run a separately warranted harmless task.

blockers: personal Gmail and plan eligibility unverified
software not installed for this mission
local file terminal browser and data policies not approved
evaluations.smallest_external_action: Approve account and local-data boundaries, install in an isolated non-production workspace, select review-driven policies, and run a separately warranted read-only trial.

unresolved_external_actions: Human account eligibility and terms readback
Separate provider-activation approval for any login installation or consent
Separate repository-access approval before any Jules GitHub grant
Separate harmless trial warrant before any provider execution
